title: Executive Vice-President Séjourné and Commissioner Dombrovskis to highlight Europe's industrial future at Hannover Messe
content: Stéphane Séjourné, Executive Vice-President for Prosperity and Industrial Strategy, and Valdis Dombrovskis, Commissioner for Economy and Productivity; Implementation and Simplification, joined world leaders at Hannover Messe – Europe's biggest trade fair for manufacturing and technology.

title: EU action plan for gender equality and women’s empowerment in EU external action (GAP IV)

title: EU-Japan Defence Industry Dialogue
content: European Commissioner for Defence and Space, Andrius Kubilius, State Minister of Economy, Trade and Industry, Toshio Ino attended the first meeting of the EU-Japan Defence Industry Dialogue, launched by the industries of both the EU and Japan under the EU-Japan Competitiveness Alliance

title: EU presents first Action Plan under the Pact for the Mediterranean
content: Today, the European Commission outlined to representatives from EU Member States and the Southern Mediterranean the first set of key initiatives, in the form of an Action Plan, to advance the implementation of the Pact for the Mediterranean.

title: Commissioner Jørgensen in Spain to discuss ways to tackle the energy and housing crises
content: On Monday and Tuesday, 20-21 April, Commissioner for Energy and Housing Dan Jørgensen will be in Madrid and Barcelona to discuss energy security, affordability and ways to tackle the housing crisis with Spanish national and local authorities, as well as sectorial stakeholders and young people.
snippet: On Monday and Tuesday, 20-21 April, Commissioner for Energy and Housing Dan Jørgensen will be in Madrid and Barcelona to discuss energy security, affordability and ways to tackle the housing crisis wi

title: Commission advances cloud sovereignty through strategic procurement
content: This April, the European Commission awarded its Sovereign Cloud call for tender through which the EU institutions, bodies, offices and agencies (Union entities) will be able to procure sovereign cloud services for up to EUR 180 million over a period of 6 years.
snippet: This April, the European Commission awarded its Sovereign Cloud call for tender through which the EU institutions, bodies, offices and agencies (Union entities) will be able to procure sovereign cloud

title: Commission opens in-depth investigation into Romanian State aid to support refurbishment of Cernavoda 1 nuclear reactor
content: The European Commission has opened an in-depth investigation to assess whether public support that Romania plans to grant for the refurbishment and lifetime extension of Unit 1 of the Cernavoda nuclear power plant is in line with EU State aid rules.

title: EAfA Member Spotlight: Workplus connects employers with talent through apprenticeships
content: In this EAfA Member Spotlight article, we spoke with Workplus, a European Alliance for Apprenticeships (EAfA) member based in Belfast, Northern Ireland.

title: Commission approves Bulgarian, German and Slovenian State aid schemes providing temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies
content: The European Commission has approved State aid schemes to provide temporary electricity price relief for energy-intensive companies in Bulgaria, Germany and Slovenia in line with the objectives of the Clean Industrial Deal.

title: Over 10 million workers trained under the Pact for Skills
content: The annual survey on the Pact for Skills reveals that over 10 million people, including 3.9 million in 2025 alone, have benefited from upskilling initiatives since 2020.
snippet: The annual survey on the Pact for Skills reveals that over 10 million people, including 3.9 million in 2025 alone, have benefited from upskilling initiatives since 2020.

title: Zeefier: Creating natural dyes from local seaweed
content: Founded in the Netherlands, Zeefier is an innovative company developing textile dyes made from seaweed. By replacing petrol‑based chemistry with a renewable ocean resource, Zeefier offers an alternative that enables textiles to remain biodegradable.

title: Commission to invest €1.07 billion in 57 defence projects supporting European Readiness Flagships
content: Following the evaluation of the 2025 calls for the European Defence Fund (EDF), the European Commission will invest €1.07 billion in 57 new EDF projects.
snippet: Following the evaluation of the 2025 calls for the European Defence Fund (EDF), the European Commission will invest €1.07 billion in 57 new EDF projects.

title: EU joins the International Energy Agency (IEA) Cities and Energy Storage Technology Collaboration Programmes
content: The European Union, represented by the Directorate-General for Research & Innovation, formally accepted the invitation from the International Energy Agency to join the two programmes.
snippet: The European Union, represented by the Directorate-General for Research & Innovation, formally accepted the invitation from the International Energy Agency to join the two programmes.

title: EU Ecolabel surges ahead in 2026, going from strength to strength
content: Europe’s flagship environmental label hits a new high water mark, with the latest figures underscoring its growing role in steering the market towards more sustainable choices.
snippet: Europe’s flagship environmental label hits a new high water mark, with the latest figures underscoring its growing role in steering the market towards more sustainable choices.

title: Grown by nature, guided by family: The Lubimar aquaculture story
content: More than 30 years ago, Don Antonio Hernández Barrera stood under the Andalusian sun, gazing across the serene estuaries of Barbate. To most, those were simply quiet wetlands; to him, it was the canvas for a family dream.

title: Publication of the study on Wealth Taxation, Including Net Wealth, Capital and Exit Taxes
content: The study on wealth taxation, including net wealth, capital and exit taxes aims to provide a better understanding of these taxes, their interrelation and consequences.
snippet: The study on wealth taxation, including net wealth, capital and exit taxes aims to provide a better understanding of these taxes, their interrelation and consequences.

title: Commission approves €411 million Croatian capital injection into development bank HBOR
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €411 million capital injection by Croatia's government into the national development bank Hrvatska Banka za Obnovu i Razvitak ('HBOR').
snippet: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €411 million capital injection by Croatia's government into the national development bank Hrvatska Banka za Obnovu i Razvitak ('HBOR')

title: NextGenEU has mobilised €18.1 billion to boost housing affordability
content: 1.5 million households are estimated to have a better living situation thanks to the EU's Recovery and Resilience Facility (RRF), also known as NextGenEU. In this brochure, it's explored how € 18.1 billion has been invested in housing.

title: EU and Iceland advance ocean cooperation at high-level dialogue in Reykjavik
content: The European Union and Iceland held today a High-Level Dialogue on ocean cooperation in Reykjavik, reinforcing their shared commitment to sustainable fisheries, Arctic governance, and the blue economy.

title: EU and South Korea strengthen trade and technology cooperation

title: Commissioner Síkela to visit Ethiopia and open EU-Ethiopia Business Forum
content: European Commissioner for International Partnerships Jozef Síkela will visit Ethiopia on 20 and 21 April 2026, opening the EU-Ethiopia Business Forum in Addis Ababa and meeting with government, business and international partners.

title: Founding treaty of EU’s predecessor turns 75
content: On April 18 we celebrate 75 years since the signing of the Treaty of Paris establishing the European Coal and Steel Community (ECSC), the first Treaty that led to the creation of the European Union.
snippet: On April 18 we celebrate 75 years since the signing of the Treaty of Paris establishing the European Coal and Steel Community (ECSC), the first Treaty that led to the creation of the European Union.

title: BlueInvest Africa 2026: Meet the 25 African startups pitching to global investors
